Title: Charmed
Writer: Constance M. Burge, Jessica O'Toole, Amy Rardin
Actors: Melonie Diaz, Sarah Jeffery, Rupert Evans
Plot: This reboot of the original series centers on three sisters in a college town who discover they are witches. Between vanquishing supernatural demons, tearing down the patriarchy, and maintaining familial bonds, a witch's work is never done.
